title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 13
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a school play rehearsal.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you seen the message about the school play rehearsal? I wrote down in the main hall, but I cannot find the message now. || Man: That was the original plan, but the hall is being used for an examination. [1]We need to meet in the drama studio instead[/1]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the main hall and missed everyone. || Man: No problem. I will get there a few minutes early, and I will text you if the organiser changes anything again before we leave.
items.question: Where is the rehearsal today?
items.explanation: The rehearsal is in the drama studio.

items.context: You hear two friends packing for a hill walk.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you packed for the hill walk? I was going to take a sun hat. Is that still right? || Woman: It was on the first list, but the path is wet and muddy after the rain yesterday. [1]You need to bring walking boots instead[/1]. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly closed my bag without it. || Woman: Put it in now and check again before you leave. The organiser said we must be ready on time tomorrow, because the group cannot wait for anyone who forgets something important.
items.question: What should they take?
items.explanation: They need to take walking boots.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the weekend.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to go shopping on Saturday? I told my family I would be home later. || Boy: That was our first idea, but the shopping centre will be extremely crowded. We could go to go cycling, though the weather forecast says there will be strong winds. [1]We are going to go ice skating instead[/1]. || Girl: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Boy: Yes, at four. I will book our places now, so there should not be a problem when we arrive.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to go ice skating.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a doctor's appointment.
items.audio_script: Boy: I need to check the time for the doctor's appointment. I wrote down three o'clock, but I am not sure it is correct. || Girl: It changed this morning because an earlier patient needs more time. [1]It starts at quarter past three now[/1], and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Boy: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time. || Girl: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go back home first.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The appointment now starts at quarter past three.

items.context: You hear two people discussing a laptop.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting on with your laptop? I heard there was a problem with it. || Man: I first thought the keyboard was broken, and my brother wondered whether the battery was empty. But the shop checked it carefully this morning. [1]The charger cable is damaged[/1]. || Woman: Can they fix that before your course tomorrow? || Man: They think so. Now they know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief, because I need to use it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the laptop?

items.context: You hear two friends planning a journey to a football match.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you travelling to the football match on Saturday? I thought you were going by car. || Woman: I planned to, but the roads will be busy after lunch. I considered going by train, but the train station is far from the stadium. [1]I am going by tram instead[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. What time will you arrive? || Woman: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the timetable online, so we have plenty of time, and I will message you when I leave home.
items.question: How will they get to the match?
items.explanation: They choose to go by tram.

items.context: You hear two people ordering food.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a cheese sandwich for lunch? I saw one yesterday and thought it would be suitable. || Boy: No. I looked at a cheese sandwich, and I nearly chose a baked potato, but the sandwich has sold out and the potato will take too long. [1]I bought vegetable soup in the end[/1]. || Girl: That sounds like the right choice. It is more useful than the other things. || Boy: I hope so. I kept the receipt in case I need to change it later.
items.question: What will the speaker order?
